form.formComment: Gave plenty of ground last start when well beaten into tenth after a quick start, behind Robust Easton at Menangle over 1609m in a 3yo+ 0LTW o eligible 3yo+ NR47 on April 7 at $13. Raced better the start before that with a solid effort when 2nd (Fr4) over 1609m after showing early pace at Menangle was leading by 3.09 at the bell, beaten 2 m by What For (1:54.50) in 3yo+ 0LTW o eligible 3yo+ NR47 on March 31 at $3.80. Should get every chance from the ace draw.

form.formComment: Good run when beaten by 6 m finishing third behind Lit The Wick at Goulburn over 2240m in a NR up to 52 on March 30 at $19.
